name: molding
description: Deposits a molding material layer over the current process footprint from cursorZ to cursorZ + thickness.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by molding. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: Molding material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thickness
parameterDefinitions.description: Molding thickness deposited from the current process cursor plane.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: ECL
description: Deposits an ECL body layer above cursorZ using the current process footprint after applying koz as an inward XY inset.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by ECL. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: ECL material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive ECL thickness deposited from the current process cursor plane.

parameterDefinitions.name: koz
parameterDefinitions.description: Keep out zone distance applied as an inward XY inset from the process footprint.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: RDL layer
description: Builds RDL dielectric layers with odd-layer downward via features and even-layer circuit features over the current process footprint.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by RDL. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: layers
parameterDefinitions.description: RDL layer stack. Odd-numbered layers create downward via features after dielectric deposit; even-numbered layers create circuit features before dielectric deposit.

itemParameterDefinitions.name: Dielectric
itemParameterDefinitions.description: Dielectric material name or material entity id.

itemParameterDefinitions.name: Conductivity
itemParameterDefinitions.description: Conductivity material name or material entity id.

itemParameterDefinitions.name: thk
itemParameterDefinitions.description: Positive thickness for this dielectric layer and its conductivity feature envelope.

itemParameterDefinitions.name: density
itemParameterDefinitions.description: Conductivity feature density recorded as a 0 to 100 percentage value.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Grinding
description: Removes geometry from the current full geometry top downward by thk while preserving the runtime process footprint.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by grinding. The operation uses the full geometry top, not cursorZ.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive grinding thickness removed downward from the highest Z in the full geometry tree.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: saw
description: Recursively cuts the main geometry to a retained XY rectangle and updates the process footprint to that rectangle.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by saw. The operation keeps only geometry inside the retained XY rectangle.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: bottomLeftX
parameterDefinitions.description: Retained rectangle lower-left X coordinate.

parameterDefinitions.name: bottomLeftY
parameterDefinitions.description: Retained rectangle lower-left Y coordinate.

parameterDefinitions.name: topRightX
parameterDefinitions.description: Retained rectangle upper-right X coordinate.

parameterDefinitions.name: topRightY
parameterDefinitions.description: Retained rectangle upper-right Y coordinate.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Debond
description: Removes the highest direct root body or bodies from the main geometry, leaving child scopes and non-body features unchanged.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by debond. The operation removes only direct root bodies at the highest direct root body top.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Carrier Bond
description: Copies carrier geometry root direct bodies onto the full geometry top as direct root bodies and updates cursorZ to the carrier stack top.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Main geometry state that receives bonded carrier direct root bodies.

inputPorts.name: carrier_geometry
inputPorts.description: Carrier geometry state. Only root direct bodies are copied; carrier geometry entities are expected to use entityType carrier.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Flip
description: Flips the main geometry around Z=0, normalizes the flipped structure to zMin 0, reverses directional via and bump features, and sets cursorZ to the highest direct root body top.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Complete geometry state consumed by Flip. The operation mirrors the full geometry tree but derives the output cursor only from direct root bodies.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Under Fill
description: Fills underfill material into bump-side child cavities and root die-to-die gaps up to gap without moving cursorZ.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Main package geometry state containing root child die scopes to be underfilled.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: Underfill material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive root die-to-die gap fill height deposited from cursorZ.

parameterDefinitions.name: gap
parameterDefinitions.description: Maximum die-to-die XY gap distance that underfill is allowed to fill.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: Micro Bump
description: Forms upward micro bump features above cursorZ using the current process footprint and records koz for downstream keep-out handling.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Die geometry state consumed by micro bump formation. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: Micro bump material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive micro bump thickness. The bump bottom is aligned to cursorZ and extends upward.

parameterDefinitions.name: density
parameterDefinitions.description: Micro bump density recorded as a 0 to 100 percentage value.

parameterDefinitions.name: koz
parameterDefinitions.description: Keep out zone distance recorded on generated micro bump features for downstream keep-out handling.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: BGA Bump
description: Forms upward BGA bump features above cursorZ using the current process footprint and records koz for downstream keep-out handling.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Die geometry state consumed by BGA bump formation. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: BGA bump material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive BGA bump thickness. The bump bottom is aligned to cursorZ and extends upward.

parameterDefinitions.name: density
parameterDefinitions.description: BGA bump density recorded as a 0 to 100 percentage value.

parameterDefinitions.name: koz
parameterDefinitions.description: Keep out zone distance recorded on generated BGA bump features for downstream keep-out handling.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: C4 Bump
description: Forms upward C4 bump features above cursorZ using the current process footprint and records koz for downstream keep-out handling.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Die geometry state consumed by C4 bump formation. The state must already carry a process footprint.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: material
parameterDefinitions.description: C4 bump material name or material entity id.

parameterDefinitions.name: thk
parameterDefinitions.description: Positive C4 bump thickness. The bump bottom is aligned to cursorZ and extends upward.

parameterDefinitions.name: density
parameterDefinitions.description: C4 bump density recorded as a 0 to 100 percentage value.

parameterDefinitions.name: koz
parameterDefinitions.description: Keep out zone distance recorded on generated C4 bump features for downstream keep-out handling.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.

name: PnP
description: Places one or more copied die geometry states onto the main geometry at the main cursorZ plane.

inputPorts.name: main_geometry
inputPorts.description: Main package geometry state that receives placed die child scopes.

inputPorts.name: die_geometry
inputPorts.description: Die geometry state copied once for each coordinate item before placement.

outputPorts.name: Result geometry
outputPorts.description: Geometry state produced by this process step.

parameterDefinitions.name: coordinates
parameterDefinitions.description: Placement coordinates. Each item gives the target lower-left XY point for one die copy.

parameterDefinitions.name: Working temperature
parameterDefinitions.description: Reference process temperature for downstream simulation input generation. Geometry process programs currently ignore this value.
